primary_sources.title: 其实 Obsidian 配合 Claude Code 就能直接低成本搞定一个懂自己且不会反复失忆的个人 AI 助理。 Obsidian 把你的研究和想法以本地纯文本的形式存下来，所有的知识对程序底层彻底敞开。 而作为一个给开发者用的本地工具， Claude Code 能直接理解这个文件夹里的全部东西。 把它指向你的笔记库，你留下的每一条灵感和每一次研究都会变成它的即时上下文。 这时候你在对话的就不再是一个只懂搜通用知识的大模型。 它能顺着你的历史脉络去串联几个月前的线索，甚至是基于你自己的思维框架去替你生成文章。
Claude Code 和 CodeX 远程连接到飞书 IM 的插件 Claude-to-IM-Skills 更新了！ 将你的 Claude Code 和 CodeX 远程连接到微信！ 而且配置方式极其简单：它会自动打开一个网页，你扫码就行。

supporting_sources.title: Every prompt you send makes Claude Code worse. This repo fixes it. Each message fills the context window. The more you type, the dumber it gets. This is called context rot. GSD is an open-source repo that kills it. One npm install. Works across Gemini CLI, Codex, and Copilot too. Here's the core trick: Every task spawns fresh sub-agents with clean 200k token context. Your main session stays at 30-40% capacity while parallel agents handle execution. The workflow runs in four steps: 1. Describe your idea fully 2. System researches and plans automatically 3. Parallel agents execute in waves 4. Each task gets an atomic git commit You walk away, come back to working code. Clean history. No degradation. The planning, research, and verification all happen in disposable agent contexts. Nothing accumulates. Nothing rots. Open-Source.
Codepilot 0.38.5 版本已经支持微信桥接 http://github.com/op7418/CodePilot/releases/tag/v0.38.5

forbidden_claims: No unsupported percentage claims about performance or cost change.
No unsupported claim that this release fully replaces existing workflows.
No unsupported claim that all teams should adopt immediately.
